holdings.name: BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency

raw.Name: BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency

overview.description: The index is designed to measure the performance of a strategy of holding the iShares Russell 2000 ETF while writing (selling) one-month call options primarily on the Russell 2000 Index to generate income. The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing a substantial portion of its assets in the underlying fund and options on the option index.

The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing a substantial portion of its assets in the underlying fund and options on the option index.
